- Fix home detection for custom user account setup on Linux, e.g. with active directory, due to broken JDK methods
- Use system proxy configuration by default for http client
- Fix msi installer not always updating all files when versions stayed the same
- Improve options to specify a custom JavaFX version
- Fix GitHub workflow sometimes getting stuck on Windows when gradle daemon was still running
- Fix Windows shutdown hook not working properly when window was hidden and shown again
- Improve rendering performance on Windows
- Bump JavaFX to 27-ea+4
- Fix AOT cache not being generated on Windows ARM systems
